dataList.content: In the earlier part of the battle, Docent Rufo gains Protection equal to the number of allied Students. Try taking out the Students first.
Identities inflicted with Palette Vibrante may find it difficult to win Clashes against Rufo. Try having those Identities use a Defensive Skill.
In the later part of the battle, Docent Rufo gains a high Protection Stack. Consider that her Protection Stack can be lowered by inflicting her with a variety of negative effect types.
